title: Ennai Thaalaattum Sangeetham Lyrics Unnai Ninaithu

Ennai Thaalaattum Sangeetham Lyrics Unnai Ninaithu

Ennai thaalaattum
sangeetham nee allavaa
unnai seeraattum
pon oonjal nee allavaa

unnai mazhai enbathaa
illai thee enbathaa
andha aagaayam
nilam kaatru nee enbathaa
unnai naan enbathaa

Ennai thaalaattum
sangeetham nee allavaa
unnai seeraattum
pon oonjal nee allavaa

nadhiyaaga neeyum
irundhaale naanum.
nee irukkum thooram
varai karai aagiren.

iravaaga neeyum
nilavaaga naanum
nee irukkum neram varai
uyir vazhgiren

mudhal naal en manadhil
vidhaiyaai nee irundhaai
maru naal paarkaiyile
vanamaai maarivittaai

naadi thudippodu
nadamaadi nee vazhgiraai
nenjil nee vazhgiraai.

Ennai thaalaattum
sangeetham nee allavaa
unnai seeraattum
pon oonjal nee allavaa

boologam or naal
kaatrindri ponaal
endhan uyir undhan
moochu kaatraagume

aagaayam ornaal
vidiyaamal ponaal
endhan jeevan undhan
kaiyil vilakkaagume

anbe naan irundhen
vellai kaagithamaai
ennil nee vandhaai
pesum oviyamaai

deepam nee endraal
adhil naane thiriaagiren
thinam thiriaagiren.

Ennai thaalaattum
sangeetham nee allavaa
unna seeraattum
pon oonjal nee allavaa

Ennai thaalaattum
sangeetham nee allavaa
unnai seeraattum

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song?

The song expresses deep feelings of love and affection, portraying the beauty of romantic connections.

In which movie does this song appear?

This song is featured in the movie Unnai Ninaithu.

Who are the artists behind this song?

The singer, lyricist, and music director for this song are currently unknown.

When was the song released?

The song was released on March 31, 2002.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Ennai Thaalaattum Sangeetham, the protagonist reflects on the beauty of love and the emotional connection with their partner. The song's soothing melody and romantic lyrics create a serene atmosphere, making it perfect for intimate moments. It conveys a sense of longing and affection, evoking deep emotions in listeners. This timeless piece beautifully encapsulates the essence of love in the narrative of Unnai Ninaithu.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Ennai Thaalaattum Sangeetham from Unnai Ninaithu is a mesmerizing melody that captures the essence of love and longing. The song's soothing vibes and heartfelt lyrics create an enchanting atmosphere, perfect for romantic moments. Experience the magic of this timeless classic that resonates with anyone who has ever loved deeply.
stanzaMeanings: Aren't you the music that comforts me? Aren't you the swing that shines like gold?
Isn't your rain like fire? Isn't that sky, land, and wind you? Isn't it me that you are?
Aren't you the music that comforts me? Aren't you the swing that shines like gold?
If you are the river, then I am too. I am becoming a shore until you are near.
As night and moon, I live until the time you are there.
On the first day, you were a seed in my heart. On another day, you changed into a cloud in my sight.
You walk like a river, you live in my heart.
Aren't you the music that comforts me? Aren't you the swing that shines like gold?
If the world goes away one day without wind, my life will be in your breath.
If the sky goes away one day without light, my life will be a lamp in your hand.
My love, I was like a white paper, and you came to me like a painting that speaks.
If you are the lamp, I will shine in it day and night.
Aren't you the music that comforts me? Aren't you the swing that shines like gold?
Aren't you the music that comforts me? Aren't you the swing that shines like gold?
Isn't your rain like fire? Isn't that sky, land, and wind you? Isn't it me that you are?
Aren't you the music that comforts me? Aren't you the swing that shines like gold?
